description_long: This is a modern, freestanding, side-by-side refrigerator with a sleek, brushed stainless steel exterior. The front features two tall vertical doors, with the left door displaying a slim vertical control panel and the right door bearing a small, discrete Samsung logo in the upper right corner. The doors are flat with integrated, recessed handles running the full height of the appliance, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The sides and back are plain, with a consistent metallic finish and no visible vents or grilles. The refrigerator is likely insulated and contains internal shelving, drawers, and compartments for food storage. Its robust construction and size suggest it is suitable for residential or light commercial use in urban environments.
description: A tall, brushed stainless steel side-by-side refrigerator with flat, integrated handles and a minimalist design. The front features a slim control panel and a Samsung logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical doors, a slim control panel on the left, and a Samsung logo on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, metallic surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, featureless metallic back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, metallic finish and no visible features.
attribute_brand_logo: Samsung logo, located on the upper right corner of the right door, small, black text.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated, recessed vertical handles running the full height of each door.
